quotes.text: Nothing in life delays, only our readiness does.
quotes.excerpt: Time does not withhold outcomes from us — we withhold them from ourselves by arriving at moments before we are ready to receive them.

quotes.text: Discipline is not punishment. It is the architecture of freedom.
quotes.excerpt: Those who mistake structure for constraint have never experienced the liberation that comes from mastering the self.

quotes.text: Systems outlast intentions. Build the system before you need the result.
quotes.excerpt: Relying on motivation alone is a fragile strategy. Motivation fluctuates; systems persist.
